attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
   WCMI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   WCMI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WCMI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY  END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WCMI.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, /*ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY17*/
   WCMI.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WCMI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WCMI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY  PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, 
   WCMI.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG  CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
   CASE 
		WHEN WCMI.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IN 
		/* DVAD ADDED AS PART OF SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR RELEASE*/
		 ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor','DVAD')  THEN 'Y'
		 /*KGUVVALA ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY17*/
		WHEN WCMI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN 'N'
        WHEN WCMI.LEVEL_1_SLS_HIERARCHY='WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
        WHEN WCMI.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE ='DVAR' THEN 'Y'
        WHEN WCMI.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE ='SP' 
             THEN
        CASE WHEN WCMI.RULE_CD='PARTNER_TYPE_SP_CHECK' THEN 'N'
      WHEN WCMI.RULE_CD='CHK_GU_PARTY'  
           THEN
               CASE WHEN WCMI.SOLD_TO_GUK = WCMI.END_CUST_GUK THEN 'N'
                    ELSE 'Y' 
               END
          ELSE 'Y' 
        END
   ELSE 'N'  
   END     SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG,
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
  WCMI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  FROM
(SELECT 
  WCMP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  WCMP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WCMP.END_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
  WCMP.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, 
  WCMP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WCMP.END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
  WCMP.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WCMP.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
  WCMP.BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY,
  WCMP.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
  WCMP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT,
  WCMP.PARTNER,
  WCMP.SOLD_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY,
  WCMP.BILL_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY,
  WCMP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
  WCMP.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG,
  WCMP.END_CUST_PARTY_KEY, 
  RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE LEVEL_1_SLS_HIERARCHY,
  COALESCE(NCPCT.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') PARTNER_TYPE_CODE,
  COALESCE(ECSN.RULE_CD,'UNKNOWN')  RULE_CD,
  /*RCPH_BILL_TO.GU_PARTY_KEY  BILL_TO_GUK,*/
  RCPH_SOLD_TO.GU_PARTY_KEY  SOLD_TO_GUK, /*SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR*/
  RCPH_END_CUST.GU_PARTY_KEY  END_CUST_GUK,
  WCMP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 FROM   $$STGDB.WI_SLS_CHNL_RET_DROP_SHIP_XAAS WCMP
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  ($$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPST 
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY NCPCT
    ON   (NCPCT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY= NCPST.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY
    AND     NCPST.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
    AND     NCPCT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N')) 
 ON (NCPST.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY=WCMP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY)
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_PARTY RCPH_BILL_TO
  ON (RCPH_BILL_TO.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=WCMP.BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY)*/
 /*SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR*/
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_PARTY RCPH_SOLD_TO
 ON (RCPH_SOLD_TO.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=WCMP.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY)
 /*END SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR*/
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_PARTY RCPH_END_CUST
 ON (RCPH_END_CUST.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=WCMP.END_CUST_PARTY_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CHN_SP_NODES  ECSN
 ON ( WCMP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =ECSN.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY  RSH
  ON (WCMP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ))WCMI

SELECT 
   WCMDSI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
  ,WCMDSI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
  ,WCMDSI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,WCMDSI.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE /*KGUVVALA ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY17*/
  ,WCMDSI.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  
  ,WCMDSI.END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE 
  ,WCMDSI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
  ,WCMDSI.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY  
  ,WCMDSI.BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY 
  ,WCMDSI.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY 
  ,WCMDSI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT
  ,WCMDSI.PARTNER   
  ,WCMDSI.SOLD_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY
  ,WCMDSI.BILL_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY
  ,WCMDSI.EDW_CREATE_USER  
  ,WCMDSI.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
  ,WCMDSI.PRTN_CNTRY_CD  
  ,WCMDSI.DV_END_CUST_CNTRY_CD  
  ,WCMDSI.DROP_SHIP_PARTY_SITE_KEY 
  ,CASE WHEN WCMDSI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = -999 THEN -999 
          ELSE 
              CASE   WHEN WCMDSI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = WCMDSI.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY   THEN WCMDSI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT 
       ELSE 
                         CASE WHEN WCMDSI.PRTN_CNTRY_CD = WCMDSI.DV_END_CUST_CNTRY_CD  THEN  WCMDSI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT 
          ELSE 
             CASE WHEN WCMDSI.DROP_SHIP_PARTY_SITE_KEY  = -999 THEN WCMDSI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT 
           ELSE WCMDSI.DROP_SHIP_PARTY_SITE_KEY 
                                  END 
      END
          END
  END PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  ,CASE  WHEN WCMDSI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = -999 THEN 'N' 
             ELSE  
                      CASE WHEN  WCMDSI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = WCMDSI.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY  THEN 'N' 
                             ELSE
                     CASE WHEN WCMDSI.DV_END_CUST_CNTRY_CD = 'UNK' THEN 'N'
                           ELSE  
              CASE WHEN WCMDSI.PRTN_CNTRY_CD  =  WCMDSI.DV_END_CUST_CNTRY_CD   THEN  'N' 
            ELSE 'Y' 
          END
                     END
           END
  END CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG
  ,COALESCE(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999) END_CUST_PARTY_KEY
  ,WCMDSI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  
FROM
(SELECT 
   WCMC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  ,WCMC.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,WCMC.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,WCMC.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE /*KGUVVALA ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY17*/
  ,WCMC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,WCMC.END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE
  ,WCMC.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,WCMC.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY
  ,WCMC.BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY
  ,WCMC.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY
  ,WCMC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT
  ,WCMC.PARTNER
  ,WCMC.SOLD_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY
  ,WCMC.BILL_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY
  ,WCMC.EDW_CREATE_USER  
  ,WCMC.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
  ,WCMC.PRTN_CNTRY_CD  
  ,WCMC.DV_END_CUST_CNTRY_CD 
  ,COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DROP_SHIP_PARTY_SITE_KEY
  ,WCMC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SLS_CHNL_RET_CNTRY_XAAS WCMC 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  (SELECT PS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, 
    COALESCE(PS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT,-999) PARTY_ID,
    COALESCE(DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
    COALESCE (BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
     FROM 
    $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE PS,
    $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY PC
     WHERE 1=1
     AND   PS.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY = PC.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY
       AND   PS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
     AND   PC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
     QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
        ORDER BY PARTY_ID ASC) =1)  DSHIP
  /*ON WCMC.BILL_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY = DSHIP.GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY*/
  ON WCMC.SOLD_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY = DSHIP.GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY /* SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR */
 AND WCMC.DV_END_CUST_CNTRY_CD = DSHIP.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
) WCMDSI
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_END_CUST_LOC
  ON(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = WCMDSI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY )

SELECT 
   WCMP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   WCMP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WCMP.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WCMP.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, /*ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY17*/
   WCMP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
   WCMP.END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
   WCMP.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WCMP.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
   WCMP.BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY,
   WCMP.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
   WCMP.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT,
   WCMP.PARTNER,
   WCMP.SOLD_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY ,
   WCMP.BILL_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY ,
   WCMP.EDW_CREATE_USER,
   WCMP.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
   COALESCE(PART_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK') PRTN_CNTRY_CD,
   COALESCE(END_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK') DV_END_CUST_CNTRY_CD,
   WCMP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 FROM
 (SELECT  
   WCMP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY      SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   WCMP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY      SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WCMP.END_CUSTOMER_KEY       END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WCMP.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, /*ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY17*/
   WCMP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY    DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WCMP.END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE      END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
   WCMP.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY      BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   /*-999      SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,*/
   NEP.PARTY_KEY SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,  /*SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR*/ 
   NECAL.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY     BILL_TO_PARTY_KEY,
   COALESCE(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999) DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY , 
   
  /* COALESCE(BILL_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
   'BILL_TO'     PARTNER,
   -999 SOLD_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY ,*/
 
 /* SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR RELEASE*/
          CASE WHEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL 
    THEN -999
            WHEN BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL
         THEN COALESCE(SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY ,-999)
            WHEN  SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY =BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
         THEN BILL_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
              WHEN  SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY  <> BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
         THEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
       ELSE  -999
        END         PARTNER_PARTY_KEY_AS_IS,
		  CASE WHEN PARTNER_PARTY_KEY_AS_IS =-999 AND NEP.ERP_PARTY_NAME LIKE ANY  ('%CS CAPITAL%','%CISCO SYSTEMS CAPITAL%', 'CISCO SYSTEMS FINANCE %','EXPEDIA INC')
  THEN COALESCE(SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) 
  ELSE PARTNER_PARTY_KEY_AS_IS END AS PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
  CASE WHEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL 
    THEN 'SOLD_TO'
       WHEN BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL  
         THEN 'SOLD_TO' 
       WHEN  SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY =BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
         THEN 'BILL_TO'
       WHEN  SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY  <> BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
         THEN 'SOLD_TO'
       ELSE 'SOLD_TO'
  END         PARTNER,
  COALESCE(SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) SOLD_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY ,
 /* END SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR RELEASE*/
 
   COALESCE(BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) BILL_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY,
   USER               EDW_CREATE_USER,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)       EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
   WCMP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  FROM  $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RETRO_BKG_MSR_FOR_XAAS WCMP 
/*  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL
   ON(NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = WCMP.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY )
    LEFT JOIN ( $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY NEP
    ON(NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER) 
      )
   ON NECAL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY=NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_END_CUST_LOC
   ON(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = WCMP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE  BILL_TO_PARENT
   ON(NEP.PARTY_KEY=BILL_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY)
   AND BILL_TO_PARENT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N') WCMP*/
 
/* SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR RELEASE*/
  INNER JOIN ( $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
                                INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY NEP
                                ON(NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER) 
                                                                )
                ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY= WCMP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL
                ON(NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = WCMP.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY )
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA_END_CUST
                                  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY NEP_END_CUST
                                  ON(NEP_END_CUST.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA_END_CUST.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER) 
                                                                )
                ON (NCA_END_CUST.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY= WCMP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_END_CUST_LOC
                ON(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = WCMP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE  SOLD_TO_PARENT
                ON(NEP.PARTY_KEY=SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY)
                AND SOLD_TO_PARENT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE  BILL_TO_PARENT
                ON(NECAL.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=BILL_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY)
                AND BILL_TO_PARENT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE STP
                ON STP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = WCMP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE SHIPS
                ON STP.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
                AND SHIPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N' 
				)WCMP
 /* END SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR RELEASE*/

  LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT  
          NPAL.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,NPLA.PARTY_KEY
      FROM       $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR NLOC
      ON       NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY=NLOC.LOCATOR_KEY
      AND       NLOC.SS_CODE='CR'
      AND       NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE='POSTAL ADDRESS'
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
      ON       NLOC.LOCATOR_KEY=NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY 
     ) PART_CTRY
  ON       WCMP.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = PART_CTRY.PARTY_KEY 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT     NPAL.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, NPLA.PARTY_KEY
       FROM       $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
       INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR NLOC
      ON       NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY=NLOC.LOCATOR_KEY
      AND       NLOC.SS_CODE='CR'
      AND       NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE='POSTAL ADDRESS'
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
      ON       NLOC.LOCATOR_KEY=NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY 
    ) END_CTRY
  ON       WCMP.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = END_CTRY.PARTY_KEY

SELECT 
   BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY    AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
   BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE     AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
   BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
   CHNL_MTRX.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY   AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
   --CHNL_MTRX.SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG   AS 
   CASE 
    --WHEN BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'N' 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
            WHEN BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE= 'DVAD' THEN 'Y'
            --WHEN BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' THEN 'Y'
            WHEN CHNL_MTRX.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN 'N'
            WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
		   CASE WHEN --MPH.PARTNER_TYPE_CD='SP' AND 
		   RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'Y'
           ELSE CASE WHEN PSH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = PEH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT  THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y' END END      
		   WHEN (MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'Y'
		   WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'N' 
		   WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'UNREGISTERED' AND MPH.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'Y'
ELSE 'N'
       END AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
   CHNL_MTRX.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG   AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
   /*SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR*/
                CASE 
                WHEN CHNL_MTRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE = 'DVAD' THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N' 
    END   AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
    /*END SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR*/
   ,USER       AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
   ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)    AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
   /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
    CASE WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND SOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 'OTHERS'
                WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND SOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT > 0  THEN 'DIRECT'
                WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'   THEN '1-TIER'
                ELSE 'OTHERS'
                END  DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD ,
CASE 
    --WHEN BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'REBATES' 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
            WHEN BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE= 'DVAD' THEN 'CHANNEL'
            --WHEN BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' THEN 'CHANNEL'
            WHEN CHNL_MTRX.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
            WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
		   CASE WHEN --MPH.PARTNER_TYPE_CD='SP' AND 
		   RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'CHANNEL'
           ELSE CASE WHEN PSH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = PEH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT  THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
           ELSE 'CHANNEL' END END      
		   WHEN (MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'CHANNEL'
		   WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
		   WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'UNREGISTERED' AND MPH.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'CHANNEL'
ELSE 'NON CHANNEL'
       END BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE				
  FROM 
  (SELECT
  BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
SALES_ORDER_KEY       
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBKM
WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='XAAS'

  ) BKG_TRX
  
  INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD
  ON BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = FD.CALENDAR_DATE
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_DATES_XAAS ETL
   ON (ETL.CALENDAR_DATE = FD.CALENDAR_DATE AND 
   BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE <> '1900-01-01')
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SALES_CHANNEL_RET_XAAS CHNL_MTRX
   ON ( BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND
       BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
       BKG_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
	   BKG_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
       COALESCE(BKG_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) = CHNL_MTRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
       CASE 
    WHEN BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
    THEN CAST(-777 AS Integer)
    ELSE COALESCE(BKG_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) 
       END     = CHNL_MTRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SOL
  ON BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
  ON BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 	
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MPH 
  ON CHNL_MTRX.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY=MPH.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  AND MPH.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY > 0
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER PEH 
  ON PEH.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=COALESCE(BKG_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SOLDTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER PSH 
  ON PSH.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
/*  LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PRTNR_GLBL_RPRTG_PRFL PTNR
  ON PTNR.PARTNER_CNTRY_PRTY_KEY = MPH.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY     
  AND PTNR.BK_RPRTG_PROFILE_TYPE_NAME    ='PARTNER PRIMARY PRACTICE L1'
  AND PTNR.EFFECTIVE_END_DT='3500-01-01'
  AND MPH.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY  > 0 */
  WHERE BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE <> 'DVAD' 
  AND CHNL_MTRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE <> 'DVAD'
 /* AND CHNL_MTRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE=BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE */ /* COMMENTED AS PROD FIX */
  
  UNION ALL
  
 SELECT 
   BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY    AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
   BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE     AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
   BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
   /* Added by sounsubr part of ECR # CHG0114234 on 07/14/2019 */
   CASE WHEN CHNL_MTRX.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG ='Y' THEN CHNL_MTRX.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
	WHEN CHNL_MTRX.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG ='N' AND  CASE WHEN COALESCE(NCPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) = -999 THEN -999
		ELSE COALESCE(NP.PARTY_KEY,-999) 
	END = -999 THEN CHNL_MTRX.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
	ELSE CASE WHEN COALESCE(NCPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) = -999 THEN -999
		ELSE COALESCE(NP.PARTY_KEY,-999) 
	END  END PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
   --CHNL_MTRX.SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG   AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
   CASE 
    --WHEN BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'REBATES' 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
	  ELSE 'Y'
       END AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG ,
   CHNL_MTRX.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG   AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
   /*SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR*/
                CASE 
                WHEN CHNL_MTRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE = 'DVAD' THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N' 
    END   AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
    /*END SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR*/
   ,USER       AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
   ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)    AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
   /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
    CASE WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND SOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 'OTHERS'
                WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND SOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT > 0  THEN 'DIRECT'
                WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'   THEN '1-TIER'
                ELSE 'OTHERS'
                END  DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD ,
CASE 
    --WHEN BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'REBATES' 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
	  ELSE 'CHANNEL'
       END BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE				
  FROM 
  (SELECT
  BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
SALES_ORDER_KEY  ,
DV_DEAL_ID     
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBKM
WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='XAAS'

  ) BKG_TRX
  
  INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD
  ON BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = FD.CALENDAR_DATE
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_DATES_XAAS ETL
   ON (ETL.CALENDAR_DATE = FD.CALENDAR_DATE AND 
   BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE <> '1900-01-01')
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SALES_CHANNEL_RET_XAAS CHNL_MTRX
   ON ( BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND
       BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
       BKG_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
	   BKG_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
       COALESCE(BKG_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) = CHNL_MTRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
       CASE 
    WHEN BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
    THEN CAST(-777 AS Integer)
    ELSE COALESCE(BKG_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) 
       END     = CHNL_MTRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SOL
  ON BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_DM_DEAL_PARTNER_VW STDEALS	
	ON BKG_TRX.DV_DEAL_ID = STDEALS.OPTY_NUMBER 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
	ON STDEALS.PARTNER_SITE_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT AND
	NP.SS_CODE = 'CR'

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
	ON NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = NP.PARTY_KEY
	AND NCPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
  ON BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  WHERE BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE = 'DVAD' 
  AND CHNL_MTRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE=BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE

SELECT CALENDAR_DATE 
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDTY
 WHERE RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (0,1,2) AND
 NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_PROCESS_DATES_CHANNEL_MTX OPNMTH
 WHERE OPNMTH.BK_CALENDAR_DATE = RFDTY.CALENDAR_DATE )

SELECT
  NDNBT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY      SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  NDNBT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY      SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDNBT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDNBT.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, /*KGUVVALA ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY17*/
  CASE WHEN NDNBT.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
   THEN -777
       ELSE COALESCE(NDNBT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
  END AS            DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  'ACCOUNT_LOCATION'   END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
  NDNBT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY      BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  /*NDNBT.PROCESS_DATE       PROCESS_DATE,*/
  NDNBT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE   PROCESS_DATE,
  USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  NDNBT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  
 FROM  
 (SELECT
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBKM
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_DATES_XAAS NFM_CURR
  /*ON NDNBT.PROCESS_DATE = BK_CALENDAR_DATE */
  ON NBKM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NFM_CURR.CALENDAR_DATE 
 WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='XAAS'
) NDNBT
WHERE NDNBT.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE <> 'DVAD' 
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY 
      NDNBT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
      COALESCE(NDNBT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999),
      CASE WHEN NDNBT.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
         THEN -777
           ELSE COALESCE(NDNBT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
      END,
      BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
      SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
      SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY	  
   ORDER BY NDNBT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE DESC 
   )  =1
   
  UNION ALL 
  
   SELECT
  NDNBT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY      SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  NDNBT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY      SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDNBT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDNBT.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, /*KGUVVALA ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY17*/
  CASE WHEN NDNBT.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
   THEN -777
       ELSE COALESCE(NDNBT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
  END AS            DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  'ACCOUNT_LOCATION'   END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
  NDNBT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY      BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  /*NDNBT.PROCESS_DATE       PROCESS_DATE,*/
  NDNBT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE   PROCESS_DATE,
  USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  NDNBT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 FROM  
 (SELECT
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBKM
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_DATES_XAAS NFM_CURR
  /*ON NDNBT.PROCESS_DATE = BK_CALENDAR_DATE */
  ON NBKM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NFM_CURR.CALENDAR_DATE 
 WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='XAAS'
) NDNBT
WHERE NDNBT.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE = 'DVAD' 
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY 
      NDNBT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
      COALESCE(NDNBT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999),
      CASE WHEN NDNBT.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
         THEN -777
           ELSE COALESCE(NDNBT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
      END,
      BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
      SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
      SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY	  
   ORDER BY NDNBT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE DESC 
   )  =1
